chapter_title: Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
text: The appropriate municipal authority may revoke or refuse to issue or renew a person’s municipal license to operate an automotive wrecking and salvage yard if the authority finds the person violated a provision of this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 397. Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
##### § 397.013 — Revocation of License

The appropriate municipal authority may revoke or refuse to issue or renew a person’s municipal license to operate an automotive wrecking and salvage yard if the authority finds the person violated a provision of this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The appropriate municipal authority may revoke or refuse to issue or renew a person’s municipal license to operate an automotive wrecking and salvage yard if the authority finds the person violated a provision of this chapter.
